name: io.github.zoom/zoom-tasks
title: Zoom Tasks MCP Server
description: Zoom Tasks server for creating, updating, assigning, and synchronizing task workflows.

examples.name: Create tasks
examples.description: Create Zoom Tasks with assignees, collaborators, steps, and task details.

examples.name: Review task work
examples.description: Retrieve task details, comments, assignees, collaborators, and task steps.

examples.name: Update workflows
examples.description: Update tasks, reorder steps, manage comments, and synchronize task progress.
